title: Issue 2046 operational self-improvement effectiveness
lane_outcome: Make self-improvement, dogfooding, workflow-obligation, optimization-posture, and core module signals change ordinary AW behavior or produce explicit non-applicability/routing states for issue #2046.
purpose_for_parent: Close the #2046 parent only when operational pressure demonstrably affects ordinary work across more than one signal/module class; first slices must not close the parent by fixing only one symptom.
technical_strategy: Start with the narrow improvement-pressure posture compiler slice, then layer session dogfooding persistence/routing, workflow-obligation disposition states, optimization-posture enforcement, and module-effectiveness fixtures. Keep broad repo-friction scans selector-gated unless a slice explicitly changes that cost model.

slice_sequence.title: #2046 first slice: session improvement pressure posture compiler
slice_sequence.purpose_for_lane: Compile cheap current-session improvement pressure into task_posture_packet obligations for ordinary start/implement, or expose explicit non-applicability/not-checked reasons without running broad repo-friction scans.
slice_sequence.proof: Focused start/implement CLI tests plus runtime mirror consistency.
slice_sequence.residual_after_slice: Repo-wide improvement pressure, workflow-obligation disposition states, optimization enforcement, and module-effectiveness fixtures remain future slices.

slice_sequence.title: #2046 session dogfooding capture/routing
slice_sequence.purpose_for_lane: Make observed dogfooding friction capturable and routable from ordinary work without relying on chat memory.
slice_sequence.proof: CLI/report fixture showing capture, route, dismiss, accepted-risk, no-signal, and unresolved states.
slice_sequence.residual_after_slice: No lane-local residue; durable follow-ups are tracked outside #2046 as #2048/#2049.

slice_sequence.title: #2046 workflow obligation disposition states
slice_sequence.purpose_for_lane: Distinguish command-run ceremony from fixed, routed, dismissed, accepted-risk, no-signal, or unresolved behavior-changing obligations.
slice_sequence.proof: Workflow obligation fixture where diagnostic execution alone does not satisfy a behavior-changing obligation.
slice_sequence.residual_after_slice: No lane-local residue; diagnostic execution alone is explicitly marked insufficient.

slice_sequence.title: #2046 optimization posture enforcement
slice_sequence.purpose_for_lane: Make optimization_bias=agent-efficiency enforce at least one ordinary output/proof/selector default without hiding safety or proof.
slice_sequence.proof: Budget or selector fixture proving the configured posture changes output/routing.
slice_sequence.residual_after_slice: No lane-local residue; compact-router-first and proof-output-cap are exposed as enforceable effects.

slice_sequence.title: #2046 module-effectiveness fixture matrix
slice_sequence.purpose_for_lane: Prove Workspace, Planning, Memory, and Verification signals each change behavior or are explicitly advisory/non-applicable.
slice_sequence.proof: Fixture matrix across core module signals and ordinary task posture/proof/closeout effects.
slice_sequence.residual_after_slice: External review/merge ownership remains outside local implementation; #2046 runtime acceptance is covered.

acceptance_boundary: The lane is complete only when #2046 acceptance evidence covers more than one signal/module class and child symptom slices remain bounded rather than silently closing the parent.
proof_strategy: Each slice must include focused CLI fixtures showing at least one operational effect or explicit non-applicability state; lane closeout aggregates slice proof and records residual parent gaps before any #2046 completion claim.

evidence: issue-2046-improvement-pressure-posture: focused start/implement tests passed; runtime_mirror_consistency in_sync; make test-workspace, make lint-workspace, tests/test_workspace_cli.py, make typecheck, summary, and git diff --check passed.
issue-2046-session-dogfooding-capture: dogfooding signal status and session improvement intake expose capture routes, disposition states, and closeout-blocking unresolved observations.
issue-2046-workflow-obligation-disposition: workflow obligations now expose behavior-changing/advisory effects and mark diagnostic execution alone as insufficient.
issue-2046-optimization-effect: optimization_bias=agent-efficiency surfaces compact-router-first and proof-output-cap effects without suppressing safety or proof residue.

issue-2046-module-effectiveness-matrix: task_posture_packet operational_effectiveness records Workspace, Planning, Memory, and Verification signals as behavior-changing, advisory, non-applicable, or unresolved.
known_gaps: External GitHub issue/PR closure remains outside this local implementation closeout.
Installed payload freshness remains unclaimed because doctor reported payload sync-required and this lane did not change installed payload surfaces.
Out-of-scope dogfooding findings are tracked separately as #2048/#2049.

residual_lane_work: No #2046 lane-local implementation work remains; external review/merge and installed-payload freshness are separate ownership.
lane_to_epic_contribution: The lane proves multiple signal/module classes change ordinary task posture, routing, proof, or closeout boundaries, while child #2045/#2047 remain bounded symptoms.

closeout_state.summary: Full #2046 lane implementation evidence is present locally and the full-lane execplan was archived with lane intent satisfied.
closeout_state.residual_work: External review/merge and issue closure only.

notes: The user corrected the scope to the whole lane, so the remaining planned slices were implemented together in the full-lane execplan. Durable follow-ups #2048/#2049 remain outside #2046.
